tuning: E A D G B E
content:
"Oh Girl"
              

Intro:
[ch]A[/ch] 

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Oh, girl[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]
I'd be in trouble if you left me now[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause I don't know where to look for love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
I just don't know how[/tab]

Verse 2:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Oh, girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
How I depend on you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]
To give me love when I need it[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]E[/ch]
Right on time you would always be[/tab]

Bridge:

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
All my friends call me a fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
They say, "let the woman take care of you"[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
So I try to be hip and think like the crowd[/tab]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]                                 [ch]E[/ch]
But even the crowd can't help me now, oh-oh-oh[/tab]

Verse 3:
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
Oh, girl[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C#m[/ch]
Tell me, what am I gonna do[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]
I know I got a guilty face[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
Girl, I feel so out of place, oh yeah[/tab]
        
[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]   
(Harmonica solo over verse chords)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]  
...don't know where to go, who to see, yeaH...[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]  
(Harmonica solo over verse chords)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
All my friends call me a fool[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]                            [ch]E[/ch]
They say, "let the woman take care of you"[/tab]

Verse 4:
[tab][ch]A[/ch] 
Oh, girl[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
I guess I better go[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]    
I can save myself a lot of useless tears[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Girl I've gotta get away from here[/tab]

Verse 5:
[tab][ch]A[/ch] 
Oh, girl[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]
Pain will double if you leave me now[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]   
'Cause I don't know where to look for love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]
And I don't, I don't know how[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]   [ch]C#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Bm[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]  [X5]
Harmonica solo over verse chords; fade 5th time[/tab]

Some chords an verses changed from a previous version.
Enjoy it.
juan meb
